mapper.insert:
select SEQ_MID.nextval from dual
insert into management_history values(#{index},#{type},#{subType},sysdate,#{comment},#{subIndex},#{userId})
mapper.select:
select count(*) from management_history mh join "USER" u on mh.user_id = u.user_id
left outer join review r on r.review_num = mh.sub_index
left outer join question q on q.q_index = mh.sub_index
left outer join answer a on a.a_index = mh.sub_index
and mh.type = 'R' and mh.type = 'U' and mh.type = 'Q' and mh.type = 'A'
and mh.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'

select mh.*, u.nickname, r.review as title q.title a.content as title null AS title from management_history mh join "USER" u ON mh.user_id = u.user_id
left outer join review r on r.review_num = mh.sub_index
left outer join question q on q.q_index = mh.sub_index
left outer join answer a on a.a_index = mh.sub_index left outer join question q on q.q_index = a.q_index
and mh.type = 'R' and mh.type = 'U' and mh.type = 'Q' and mh.type = 'A'
and mh.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
order by mh.update_date desc
